Lost Island 2: The Ashes of Time

Explore the mysterious Lost Island through interconnected hand-drawn scenes. Investigate hotspots, collect items, and solve intricate puzzles to uncover the island's secrets. Combine items from your inventory, decipher codes, and manipulate mechanisms to progress. Navigate between locations using discovered pathways and use your collected items strategically to unlock new areas and complete the narrative.

Arrow Keys: Navigate between hotspots and UI elements
Space: Interact with selected hotspot or use selected inventory item
Shift: Cycle through inventory items
Z: Examine selected item or read clues
ENTER: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (return to title screen)
